applicationComponents.name: Home Discovery Platform
applicationComponents.description: Application component supporting the Home Discovery Platform service landscape.

applicationServices.name: B2C Web Application
applicationServices.description: Primary browser-based interface for property search, listing evaluation, alerts management, and contact flows.

applicationServices.name: iOS Application
applicationServices.description: Native iOS experience for search, saved alerts, push notifications, and inquiry management.

applicationServices.name: Android Application
applicationServices.description: Native Android experience aligned with iOS feature set.

applicationServices.name: Email Alert System
applicationServices.description: Transactional and behavioral email alerts for saved searches and inquiry updates.

applicationServices.name: Push Notification Service
applicationServices.description: Mobile push notifications for new matches and response updates.

applicationServices.name: Search Engine (SEO)
applicationServices.description: Organic search entry point where indexed property, area, and content pages drive discovery traffic back to the platform.

applicationServices.name: Social Media
applicationServices.description: Social platforms where shareable widgets and real estate information posts link users back to the platform.

applicationServices.name: Mortgage Integration API
applicationServices.description: API integration with financing partners for affordability calculation and prequalification.

applicationServices.name: Listing Data API
applicationServices.description: Controlled API access for ecosystem partners to retrieve listing and availability data.

applicationComponents.name: Owner Platform
applicationComponents.description: Application component supporting the Owner Platform service landscape.

applicationServices.name: Owner Web Application
applicationServices.description: Browser-based dashboard for valuation, listing creation, performance tracking, and lead management.

applicationServices.name: Owner iOS Application
applicationServices.description: Mobile-optimized access to listing management and inquiry monitoring.

applicationServices.name: Owner Android Application
applicationServices.description: Mobile-optimized access to listing management and inquiry monitoring.

applicationServices.name: Performance Analytics Dashboard
applicationServices.description: Analytics interface displaying listing views, inquiries, pricing insights, and conversion signals.

applicationServices.name: Agent Handoff API
applicationServices.description: Structured routing interface to transfer high-intent owners to professional agents.

applicationComponents.name: Pro Agency Platform
applicationComponents.description: Application component supporting the Pro Agency Platform service landscape.

applicationServices.name: Pro Portal
applicationServices.description: Primary B2B web interface for listing lifecycle management, visibility control, and lead handling.

applicationServices.name: Listing Ingestion API
applicationServices.description: API for bulk listing upload and synchronization with agency systems.

applicationServices.name: CRM Integration API
applicationServices.description: Bidirectional integration interface for lead and listing synchronization with external CRMs.

applicationServices.name: ROI & Performance Dashboard
applicationServices.description: Analytics interface showing lead performance, response time, ranking exposure, and ROI metrics.

applicationInteractions.description: Home Discovery Platform exchanges domain information with Owner Platform as part of the end-to-end operating model.
Owner Platform exchanges domain information with Pro Agency Platform as part of the end-to-end operating model.
